regions.priceFilter: PASS — Para Hills $520k, Salisbury $615k, Mawson Lakes $720k, Ingle Farm $700k
regions.primaryDriver: AUKUS submarine program at Osborne: 5,500 build jobs + 4,000 infrastructure jobs, 30-year visibility. Plus RAAF Edinburgh + ASC + BAE Hunter frigates.
regions.note: DEFINITIVE #1 PLAY under new rules. AUKUS = 30-year owner-occupier demand from defence workers (engineers $80-150k). Owner-occupier dominant = NG tax change matters less. 0.5% vacancy = tightest in nation. Adelaide +12.2% YoY, 75% clearance rates (highest of capitals). North-South Corridor completion 2031.
regions.keyRisk: Some northern suburbs have crime/public housing concentration (Davoren Park, Salisbury Downs). Stick to Para Hills, Ingle Farm, Mawson Lakes.
regions.newBuildsAvailable: Munno Para H&L $620k, Andrews Farm $640k, Riverlea (caution — supply)

regions.region: WA — Perth south (HMAS Stirling AUKUS catchment)
regions.priceFilter: PASS — Wellard $710k, Baldivis $750k, Parmelia $700k, Cooloongup $650k, Orelia $620k
regions.primaryDriver: HMAS Stirling AUKUS: $8B infrastructure + 3,000 direct jobs. Submarine Rotational Force-West starts 2027. Plus Henderson Defence Precinct 3,000 more jobs.
regions.note: Perth's defence anchor + coastal lifestyle + sub-$800k entry. Wellard/Baldivis/Parmelia all directly catchment for Stirling personnel. Submarine Discovery Centre opening Rockingham. Combines Perth growth (+26% capital) with defence stability.
regions.keyRisk: Cycle risk — Perth +26% may moderate. New estate supply in Baldivis/Wellard outer.

regions.priceFilter: PASS — Kirwan $550k, Condon $599k, Aitkenvale $681k, Kelso $580k, Mount Louisa $620k
regions.primaryDriver: Lavarack Barracks (Army 3rd Brigade) + RAAF Townsville largest in north QLD = 10,000+ defence personnel. CopperString HVDC $5B+ ($7B private investment locked) unlocks NWMP $680B critical minerals province. Population +30% to 264k by 2046.
regions.note: Townsville +15.6% YTD median $605k. 0.6% vacancy + 9.1% rental growth = CASH FLOW POSITIVE from day 1, sidestepping NG tax change. Defence + critical minerals + renewables triple catalyst. Propertyology #1 capital growth pick.
regions.keyRisk: 2nd QLD property = ~$500-1,500/yr land tax. Cyclone insurance premiums rising 20-30%/yr. Climate.
regions.newBuildsAvailable: Burdell + Mount Low + Bohle Plains H&L $580-700k

regions.priceFilter: PASS — Armadale $605k, Midland $636k, Maddington $660k, Thornlie $680k, Kelmscott $640k
regions.primaryDriver: Perth +26% strongest in AU. METRONET delivery (Midland Feb 2026 = +22% suburb growth). Mining wealth + structural undersupply.
regions.note: General Perth growth play — strongest capital. But cycle peak risk now. Some outer suburbs have crime (Armadale 97/100, Gosnells/Maddington). Stick to Midland or southside (covered separately above).
regions.keyRisk: Cycle peak. Crime in Armadale/Gosnells. NG change bites speculative buyers.

regions.priceFilter: PASS — Cessnock $560k, Maitland $720k, Raymond Terrace $640k. Newcastle proper $850k borderline.
regions.primaryDriver: RAAF Williamtown 4,500+ jobs F-35 base, sustainment for all 72 AU F-35s, BAE Astra Aerolab expansion. Hunter REZ $3.9B/590 jobs from 2026. Combined defence + renewable double catalyst.
regions.note: Underrated previously. F-35 sustainment is 30+ year contract. REZ construction starting now. Surrounding suburbs Cessnock/Maitland/Raymond Terrace still under $800k.
regions.keyRisk: NSW stamp duty highest. Hunter has some mining transition uncertainty. Newcastle proper over budget.

regions.priceFilter: PASS — Logan Central $580k, Crestmead $560k, Ripley $640k, Springfield Lakes $720k
regions.primaryDriver: Brisbane +19.7% annual, 0.8% vacancy. Olympics 2032 (Logan Indoor Sports Centre + secondary precinct spillover). Cross River Rail opens 2026. Olympics construction ramping late 2026 onward.
regions.note: Brisbane growth ring with Olympics 7-year runway. Ripley fast-growing corridor between Brisbane-Ipswich. Springfield Olympic precinct. Logan affordability draws investors fleeing Brisbane prices.
regions.keyRisk: Logan has some crime/public housing pockets. 2nd QLD property = land tax. Ipswich greenfield supply.

regions.priceFilter: PASS — Caboolture $650k, Petrie $720k, Burpengary $700k. Murrumba Downs $720k (your existing area).
regions.primaryDriver: Brisbane growth ring north. Cross River Rail benefit. Petrie-Redcliffe rail extension already operating. Olympics infrastructure 2032 (Redcliffe secondary zone).
regions.note: Your Murrumba Downs is in this catchment. Strong growth + family demographics. Petrie rail connection prime. Caboolture commuter affordability.
regions.keyRisk: 2nd QLD property = land tax. Some flood-prone pockets near Pine River.

regions.region: NT — Darwin (Palmerston) AUKUS rotation + Middle Arm
regions.primaryDriver: Robertson Barracks Army 1st Brigade + AUKUS submarine rotation through Darwin + Middle Arm $1.9B precinct (LNG/hydrogen/critical minerals) + US Marine rotation. Triple defence + energy catalyst.
regions.note: Recovery momentum after 2010s downturn. Defence + energy + critical minerals. High yields (~6%). Climate consideration.
regions.keyRisk: Climate (cyclone). Boom/bust history. Energy project execution risk.

regions.region: SA — Adelaide outer north (Gawler/Munno Para new builds)
regions.priceFilter: PASS — Gawler East $720k, Munno Para H&L $620k, Andrews Farm $640k
regions.primaryDriver: Adelaide growth ripple north. Some AUKUS catchment overflow. New builds in Munno Para/Andrews Farm = keep NG benefits.
regions.note: Cheaper entry but Two Wells 43k new dwellings + Roseworthy/Riverlea = HIGH supply risk. Pick established Adelaide north (Para Hills) over outer ring unless going specifically for new-build NG tax play.
regions.keyRisk: MASSIVE supply risk — Two Wells 43k, Riverlea 12k, Roseworthy 5k new dwellings.
analystForecasts: Adelaide growth strong but outer rings face dilution
regions.newBuildsAvailable: Yes — but supply risk caveats apply

regions.primaryDriver: Affordable WA entry, train to Perth, lifestyle premium, Perth ripple effect from +26%.
regions.note: Coastal + train + sub-$600k. Retiree-skewed but workers commuting to Perth via Mandurah line. Stirling-adjacent for AUKUS overflow.
regions.keyRisk: Distance from Perth CBD. Retiree demographic. Cyclical exposure to Perth boom.

regions.primaryDriver: Inland Rail Melbourne-Brisbane (Toowoomba major node). Wellcamp airport, university, defence. Diversified inland QLD economy.
regions.note: Steady, less cyclical than coast. Inland Rail completion 2027. Defence base. Education hub.
regions.keyRisk: Slower growth than coastal QLD. Inland positioning.

regions.primaryDriver: HMAS Cairns naval base + tourism + agriculture. High yield 5-6%.
regions.note: Tropical north. Smaller market. Climate insurance premiums RISING 20-30%/yr — biggest hidden cost.
regions.keyRisk: Climate (cyclone, flood). Insurance crisis. Tourism dependency.

regions.primaryDriver: Mining + agriculture + NASA tracking station. High yield potential.
regions.note: Regional WA. High yields 6%+. Thinner market.
regions.keyRisk: Single-industry exposure. Thin liquidity. Boom/bust history.

regions.primaryDriver: RAAF East Sale pilot training base ~1,200 personnel. Latrobe renewable energy transition.
regions.note: Affordable regional VIC. Defence + renewables. But VIC tax regime + slower growth.
regions.keyRisk: VIC stamp duty surcharge. Coal transition mixed (job losses).

regions.priceFilter: PASS — Hampton Park $680k, Cranbourne West $695k, Narre Warren $720k
regions.primaryDriver: Suburban Rail Loop ($35B over 50 years), growth corridor demographics. But Melbourne only +2% annual.
regions.note: VIC investor surcharge +1.5%. Worst capital growth (+2%). NG change bites speculative plays hardest here. Owner-occupier strong but investor math broken.
regions.keyRisk: VIC tax penalties + lowest growth + supply rising in corridor estates.
regions.newBuildsAvailable: Wyndham Vale, Tarneit H&L $640-780k — but VIC tax penalty

regions.primaryDriver: Western Sydney Airport opens October 2026. Bradfield City. 28k jobs by 2031. M12 motorway opened March 2026.
regions.note: Bringelly already $935k → $2.4M. Most catchment suburbs over $800k budget. Edmondson Park/Austral borderline. Liverpool +9.3% annual but over budget.
regions.keyRisk: Over budget for $800k investor. Suburbs that fit budget are further from airport — diluted benefit.
regions.newBuildsAvailable: Marsden Park, Schofields, Edmondson Park H&L $750-900k — most over budget

regions.note: VIC tax disadvantages. Lower growth than QLD/WA/SA.

regions.note: Most suburbs above budget. Climate.

summary: Under the new tax regime (NG removed, CGT changed) the BEST regions are defence-anchored ones — Adelaide north (AUKUS Osborne) and Perth south (HMAS Stirling) are the top 2 picks because they combine: structural multi-decade demand, owner-occupier dominance (so investor NG matters less), Federal-funded jobs, and sub-$800k entry points. Townsville stays elite as the cash-flow-positive play with defence + CopperString + low entry. Newcastle is the underrated dark horse with F-35 + Hunter REZ. Logan/Ipswich Olympics play remains strong. AVOID Melbourne (tax + low growth) and most Sydney (over budget). Western Sydney Airport play is mostly priced out at $800k.
topPicks: SA — Adelaide north (AUKUS Osborne) — Para Hills/Salisbury/Ingle Farm/Mawson Lakes
WA — Perth south (HMAS Stirling AUKUS) — Wellard/Baldivis/Parmelia/Cooloongup
QLD — Townsville (Lavarack + CopperString) — Kirwan/Condon/Aitkenvale (cash flow positive)
avoids: VIC anything (1.5% surcharge + lowest growth + NG change bites)
Sydney inner/middle ($1.76M median, well over budget)
Outer Adelaide greenfield (Two Wells 43k dwellings supply risk)
Single-industry mining towns at peak (Karratha cycle risk)
strategyNote: Under new NG/CGT rules, two viable paths: (1) DEFENCE CATCHMENT ESTABLISHED — owner-occupier demand floor absorbs investor tax change, plus pick up cash-flow positive (Townsville Kirwan) where NG isn't needed; (2) NEW BUILD — H&L package in growth corridor keeps full NG + depreciation + CGT choice (Wellard WA, Munno Para SA, Ripley QLD). The 'leverage-up established suburban house and negative gear into salary' play is DEAD for new purchases.
